titles.en: Chapter on the Ritual of Walking Through the Valley of Muhassir
Chapter on the Ritual of Walking Through the Valley of Muhassir

segments: : «إِذَا مَرَرْتَ بِوَادِي مُحَسِّرٍ وَ هُوَ وَادٍ عَظِيمٌ بَيْنَ جَمْعٍ وَ مِنًى وَ هُوَ إِلَى مِنًى أَقْرَبُ فَاسْعَ فِيهِ حَتَّى تُجَاوِزَهُ فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ حَرَّكَ نَاقَتَهُ فِيهِ وَ قَالَ « اَللَّهُمَّ سَلِّمْ عَهْدِي وَ اِقْبَلْ تَوْبَتِي وَ أَجِبْ دَعْوَتِي وَ اُخْلُفْنِي بِخَيْرٍ فِيمَنْ تَرَكْتُ بَعْدِي.
arabic.text: : «إِذَا مَرَرْتَ بِوَادِي مُحَسِّرٍ وَ هُوَ وَادٍ عَظِيمٌ بَيْنَ جَمْعٍ وَ مِنًى وَ هُوَ إِلَى مِنًى أَقْرَبُ فَاسْعَ فِيهِ حَتَّى تُجَاوِزَهُ فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ حَرَّكَ نَاقَتَهُ فِيهِ وَ قَالَ « اَللَّهُمَّ سَلِّمْ عَهْدِي وَ اِقْبَلْ تَوْبَتِي وَ أَجِبْ دَعْوَتِي وَ اُخْلُفْنِي بِخَيْرٍ فِيمَنْ تَرَكْتُ بَعْدِي.

segments:
Hadith.2987 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"When you pass through the Valley of Muhassir—a significant valley between Jam‘ (Muzdalifah) and Mina, closer to Mina—hasten through it until you have crossed it.
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) quickened his camel's pace in this valley and said:
'O Allah (swt), secure my covenant, accept my repentance, answer my supplication, and bless those I have left behind with goodness after me.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2987 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"When you pass through the Valley of Muhassir—a significant valley between Jam‘ (Muzdalifah) and Mina, closer to Mina—hasten through it until you have crossed it.
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) quickened his camel's pace in this valley and said:
'O Allah (swt), secure my covenant, accept my repentance, answer my supplication, and bless those I have left behind with goodness after me.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2987 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Ritual of Walking Through the Valley of Muhassir

segments:
Hadith.2988 - Muhammad ibn Isma'il narrated from Abu al-Hasan (as), who said:
"The hastening in the Valley of Muhassir is a distance of one hundred steps."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2988 - Muhammad ibn Isma'il narrated from Abu al-Hasan (as), who said:
"The hastening in the Valley of Muhassir is a distance of one hundred steps."

narratorChain.raw: 2988 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Ritual of Walking Through the Valley of Muhassir

segments: Hadith.2989 - In another narration, it is mentioned: "A distance of one hundred cubits."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2989 - In another narration, it is mentioned: "A distance of one hundred cubits."
